taskTemplate.name: Review Appraisal – Second Review
taskTemplate.description: Internal second review of appraisal when no external review was completed

subTaskTemplate.name: Document Second Review
subTaskTemplate.description: Document Second Review – Document findings of the internal second review of the appraisal. Confirm all review notes and findings are recorded before marking complete.
subTaskTemplate.type: Review Appraisal – Second Review – Document Second Review

subTaskTemplate.name: Attach Appraisal Review Form
subTaskTemplate.description: Attach Appraisal Review Form – Attach completed appraisal review form to the file. Added once second review is complete.
subTaskTemplate.type: Review Appraisal – Second Review – Attach Appraisal Review Form
